scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && rm -rf server/dist && cp -r client/dist server/ || (rmdir /s /q server\dist 2>nul & xcopy client\dist server\dist /E /I /H /Y)
scripts.clean: rm -rf client/dist server/dist || (rmdir /s /q client\dist 2>nul & rmdir /s /q server\dist 2>nul)
